bundled_packages.name: heap
bundled_packages.bundle_reason: Cytoscape ships a prebuilt UMD bundle that already contains heap; Mermaid bundles Cytoscape’s UMD artifact directly.
bundle_evidence: package/package/dist/mermaid.js:162571-162838 contains heap implementation copied through Cytoscape’s UMD bundle
patches/cytoscape@3.28.1.patch:9-18 retargets Cytoscape import/module fields to dist/cytoscape.umd.js

bundled_packages.name: web-worker
bundled_packages.bundle_reason: ELK browser bundle embeds the web-worker package inside elkjs/lib/elk.bundled.js; Mermaid imports that ELK bundle for flowchart-elk.
bundle_evidence: package/package/dist/mermaid.js:158410-158439 shows web-worker resolution and bundled module 4 in the ELK sub-bundle
